seeds.name: JPMorgan Chase
seeds.chain_position: Global bank — diversified lending and investment banking
seeds.scarce_resource: Primary dealer and commercial banking scale concentrate corporate lending and payments flows.
seeds.can_function_without: Capital markets continue through other global banks, but large-ticket lending reroutes slowly.
seeds.replaceability_note: Share shifts among money-center banks over credit cycles, not quarterly.

seeds.name: Bank of America
seeds.chain_position: Retail and commercial bank — U.S. deposit franchise
seeds.scarce_resource: U.S. consumer and commercial deposit base anchors nationwide lending capacity.
seeds.can_function_without: Borrowers can switch banks, but mortgage and SMB relationships migrate slowly.
seeds.replaceability_note: Regional and national banks compete on rate promotions over years.

seeds.name: Goldman Sachs
seeds.chain_position: Investment bank — capital markets and advisory
seeds.scarce_resource: Advisory and trading franchise concentrates institutional capital markets access.
seeds.can_function_without: Issuers can use other bulge-bracket banks for underwriting over time.
seeds.replaceability_note: M&A and IPO league tables rotate across banks each cycle.

seeds.name: Morgan Stanley
seeds.chain_position: Wealth and investment bank — brokerage scale
seeds.scarce_resource: Wealth management AUM and institutional trading desks create sticky fee pools.
seeds.can_function_without: Clients can move advisors, but tax and lending bundles slow attrition.
seeds.replaceability_note: Wealth platforms compete on advisor teams and product breadth.

seeds.replaceability_note: Global banks win or lose mandates on country coverage cycles.

seeds.name: Cigna Group
seeds.chain_position: Health insurance — managed care and pharmacy benefits

seeds.can_function_without: Employers rebid health plans annually, but network disruption deters switching.
seeds.replaceability_note: UNH, ELV, and regional Blues compete on network discounts.

seeds.name: Humana
seeds.chain_position: Medicare-focused health insurance payer
seeds.scarce_resource: Medicare Advantage membership concentration influences MA star ratings and bids.
seeds.can_function_without: Seniors can change plans during annual enrollment.
seeds.replaceability_note: UNH and CVS/Aetna compete aggressively in MA geographies.

seeds.name: Elevance Health
seeds.chain_position: Managed care — commercial and government health insurance payer
seeds.scarce_resource: Blue Cross scale in multiple states anchors provider negotiation leverage.
seeds.can_function_without: States regulate plan switches; employers can change carriers at renewal.
seeds.replaceability_note: Regional Blues and national peers compete on premium bids.
